_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: focal loss of CDKN2A/B, MTAP, SMARCA2, and SUZ12, alterations shown to be associated with malignant transformation of PN, was observed in plasma from MPNST patients
details: Successfully detected focal somatic CNAs associated with PN tumor progression in MPNST patients, including loss of CDKN2A/B, MTAP, SMARCA2, and SUZ12
